title: Senior Compliance Officer
summary: 14 years in private banking compliance, including 6 years building AML and regulatory frameworks for a Tier 1 Swiss bank's Dubai booking centre. Led a DFSA licensing project from scratch. Fluent EN/AR/FR.
highlights: Built compliance function for new booking centre
availability: Open to new roles, 2-3 month notice

title: Chief Investment Officer
summary: Former CIO at a CHF 12bn EAM, with a track record of building discretionary mandates and rebuilding investment committees post-restructuring. Strong network among Geneva and Zurich asset managers.

title: Senior Family Office Executive
summary: Runs a multi-family office covering Southeast Asian UHNW families. Deep relationships across Indonesia, Malaysia and Singapore. Background in both private banking RM and direct family office operations.
highlights: Client base: 6 UHNW families, combined AUM USD 4bn+

title: Chief Operating Officer
summary: Operations and platform leadership across two private bank integrations, including a major UK booking centre consolidation. Strong vendor and outsourcing negotiation track record.
